tables:
- name: tbl_asset_meta
  comment: One row per asset, any of the 7 catalog kinds (design spec §5.1).
  columns:
  - name: id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Asset meta surrogate PK
    default: AUTO_INCREMENT
    pk: true
  - name: mgmt_key
    type: VARCHAR(100)
    nullable: false
    comment: Stable cross-system management key
    index: UQ_ASSET_META_MGMT_KEY
  - name: asset_type_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: 'Catalog kind: Process/TaskBundle/SOP/WorkInstruction/Policy/Template/Document'
    fk: tbl_code(code) [ASSETTYP]
    index: IDX_ASSET_META_TYPE
  - name: name
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: false
    comment: Display name
    index: IDX_ASSET_META_NAME
  - name: description
    type: VARCHAR(2000)
    nullable: true
    comment: Free-text description
  - name: category
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: true
    comment: Leaf classification category id (L1->L3 path, last segment)
  - name: category_path_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: Ordered category path array (root..leaf), JSON
  - name: class_level
    type: VARCHAR(100)
    nullable: true
    comment: 'Free-form classification axis: level'
  - name: line_of_business
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: 'Free-form classification axis: line of business'
  - name: e2e_process
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: 'Free-form classification axis: end-to-end process'
  - name: solution_area
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: 'Free-form classification axis: solution area'
  - name: module
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: 'Free-form classification axis: module'
  - name: business_objects_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of business object names
  - name: owner_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Asset owner (person)
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
    index: IDX_ASSET_META_OWNER
  - name: owner_org
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: Owning organization name
  - name: steward_name
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: false
    comment: Steward display name
  - name: steward_initials
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: Steward initials
  - name: tags_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of free-text tags
  - name: is_all_version_deactivated_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Reversible deactivation across all versions (distinct from retirement, see tbl_asset_retirement)
    default: '''N'''
  - name: external_ref_type_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: true
    comment: automation-side reference type, when linked
    fk: tbl_code(code) [EXTREFTP]
  - name: external_ref_id
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: automation-side entity id
  - name: external_ref_url
    type: VARCHAR(1000)
    nullable: true
    comment: Deep link to the automation-side entity
  - name: external_ref_label
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: Display label for the external reference
  - name: external_ref_note
    type: VARCHAR(2000)
    nullable: true
    comment: Free-text note on the external reference
  - name: custom_attributes_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: RuleSet-driven custom fields, JSON map
  - name: linked_rule_sets_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of linked RuleSet ids
  - name: approval_rule_sets_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: Per-lifecycle-stage approval RuleSet ids, JSON map
  - name: approval_checklist_state_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: Approval checklist completion state, JSON map
  - name: parent_process_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Parent Process (hierarchy; Process type only, L0 = NULL)
    fk: tbl_asset_meta(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
    index: IDX_ASSET_META_PARENT
  - name: created_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row creation time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  - name: created_by
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Creating user
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: updated_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row last-update time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  - name: updated_by
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Last-updating user
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  indexes:
  - UNIQUE uq_asset_meta_mgmt_key (mgmt_key)
  - INDEX idx_asset_meta_type (asset_type_cd)
  - INDEX idx_asset_meta_name (name)
  - INDEX idx_asset_meta_owner (owner_id)
  - INDEX idx_asset_meta_parent (parent_process_id)
  - INDEX idx_asset_meta_deactivated (is_all_version_deactivated_yn)
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_asset_version
  comment: One row per version, any asset kind (design spec §5.1).
  columns:
  - name: id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Asset version surrogate PK
    default: AUTO_INCREMENT
    pk: true
  - name: meta_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Owning asset
    fk: tbl_asset_meta(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    index: IDX_ASSET_VERSION_META
  - name: version_number
    type: INT
    nullable: false
    comment: Sequential version number within the asset
    default: '1'
  - name: version_name
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: true
    comment: Human-friendly version name
  - name: version_description
    type: VARCHAR(2000)
    nullable: true
    comment: Short version-level description
  - name: description
    type: VARCHAR(2000)
    nullable: true
    comment: Rich body description of this version's content
  - name: status_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: Draft/InReview/Active/Deprecated/Archived
    fk: tbl_code(code) [ASSETSTS]
    index: IDX_ASSET_VERSION_STATUS
  - name: maturity_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: Draft/Reviewed/Certified/Deprecated
    fk: tbl_code(code) [ASSETMAT]
  - name: lifecycle_stage_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: true
    comment: Current 9-stage governance lifecycle stage
    fk: tbl_code(code) [LIFECYCL]
    index: IDX_ASSET_VERSION_STAGE
  - name: active_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Exactly one version per asset should be Y
    default: '''Y'''
    index: IDX_ASSET_VERSION_ACTIVE
  - name: published_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Published flag
    default: '''N'''
    index: IDX_ASSET_VERSION_PUB
  - name: deleted_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Soft-delete flag
    default: '''N'''
    index: IDX_ASSET_VERSION_DEL
  - name: deleted_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: true
    comment: Soft-delete time
  - name: restored_from_version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Append-only restore provenance — source version this was restored from
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: author_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Version author
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: pending_approvers_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of pending-approver person ids
  - name: created_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row creation time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  - name: created_by
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Creating user
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: updated_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row last-update time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  - name: updated_by
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Last-updating user
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  indexes:
  - UNIQUE uq_asset_version_meta_num_name (meta_id, version_number, version_name)
  - INDEX idx_asset_version_status (status_cd)
  - INDEX idx_asset_version_stage (lifecycle_stage_cd)
  - INDEX idx_asset_version_active (active_yn)
  - INDEX idx_asset_version_pub (published_yn)
  - INDEX idx_asset_version_del (deleted_yn)
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_process_asset_detail
  comment: Process-specific version content (design spec §5.1). 1:1 with tbl_asset_version where the owning asset's asset_type_cd
    = PROCESS.
  columns:
  - name: version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: 1:1 owning version
    pk: true
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  - name: bpmn_xml
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: BPMN 2.0 XML, isExecutable=false (authoring-only)
  - name: process_yaml
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: "Serialized ProcessIntent as YAML text (shipped asset-yaml-codec). Logical process-graph SSOT: parameters, taskParameters, userTaskForms, taskOwners, taskRaci, taskProperties, flowConditions, scripts."
  - name: business_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: "Non-intent business data as JSON: {userTaskForms, taskRaci, taskDueDates, taskProperties} — the per-element data outside ProcessIntent that process_yaml does not carry."
  - name: trigger_desc
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: true
    comment: How/when this process starts (renamed from `trigger` — SQL reserved word)
  - name: sla
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: Service-level agreement text
  - name: purpose
    type: VARCHAR(2000)
    nullable: true
    comment: Why this process exists
  - name: primary_owner_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Primary accountable owner
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: backup_owner_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Backup owner
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: automation_level_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: true
    comment: Manual/Assisted/Automated rollup
    fk: tbl_code(code) [AUTOLVL]
  - name: asset_nature_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: true
    comment: enterprise / reusable-common
    fk: tbl_code(code) [ASSETNAT]
  - name: bpmn_enabled_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Whether the BPMN canvas is enabled for this process
    default: '''Y'''
  - name: automation_enabled_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Whether automation compilation is enabled (concept-only today)
    default: '''N'''
  - name: visibility_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: true
    comment: public / org / private
    fk: tbl_code(code) [ASSETVIS]
  - name: system_names_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: Catalog-only system name references, JSON array (never live-connected)
  - name: program_names_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: Catalog-only program name references, JSON array
  - name: kpis_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of {name, target, current, status}
  indexes: []
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_task_bundle_asset_detail
  comment: TaskBundle-specific version content (design spec §5.1) — reusable Call-Activity target, same CallableModelAsset
    shape as Process minus process-only fields.
  columns:
  - name: version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: 1:1 owning version
    pk: true
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  - name: bpmn_xml
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: BPMN 2.0 XML, isExecutable=false (authoring-only)
  - name: process_yaml
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: "Serialized ProcessIntent as YAML text (shipped asset-yaml-codec). Logical process-graph SSOT: parameters, taskParameters, userTaskForms, taskOwners, taskRaci, taskProperties, flowConditions, scripts."
  - name: business_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: "Non-intent business data as JSON: {userTaskForms, taskRaci, taskDueDates, taskProperties} — the per-element data outside ProcessIntent that process_yaml does not carry."
  indexes: []
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_sop_asset_detail
  comment: SOP-specific version content (design spec §5.1).
  columns:
  - name: version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: 1:1 owning version
    pk: true
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  - name: linked_process_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Process this SOP documents (optional)
    fk: tbl_asset_meta(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
    index: IDX_SOP_DETAIL_PROCESS
  - name: linked_activity_element_id
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: BPMN element id on the linked process this SOP documents
  - name: training_required_yn
    type: CHAR(1)
    nullable: false
    comment: Whether training is required before performing this SOP
    default: '''N'''
  - name: compliance_refs_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of compliance reference strings
  - name: tools_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of tool names used
  - name: roles_involved_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of role names involved
  - name: steps_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: 'Ordered SopStep[] array: {title, desc, role?, tool?, duration?, automationCandidate?, linkedBpmnElementId?}'
  - name: sop_category
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: Free-form SOP category (not code-tabled — not in the current enum inventory)
  indexes: []
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_policy_asset_detail
  comment: Policy-specific version content (design spec §5.1) — Policy stays thin.
  columns:
  - name: version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: 1:1 owning version
    pk: true
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  - name: compliance_refs_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: true
    comment: JSON array of compliance reference strings
  indexes: []
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_document_asset_detail
  comment: Document-specific version content (design spec §5.1 / Decision 3 — Document promoted to a 7th AssetType). Each
    new version = a re-upload.
  columns:
  - name: version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: 1:1 owning version
    pk: true
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  - name: file_name
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: false
    comment: Original uploaded file name
  - name: mime_type
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: false
    comment: MIME type (ppt/pdf/hwp/xlsx/...)
  - name: size_bytes
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: File size in bytes
  - name: storage_ref
    type: VARCHAR(1000)
    nullable: false
    comment: Path/key in blob storage
  - name: checksum
    type: VARCHAR(128)
    nullable: true
    comment: Content hash (e.g. sha256 hex) for integrity checks
  indexes: []
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_asset_feedback
  comment: Comments/discussion, dedicated table per design spec Decision 2 (hybrid).
  columns:
  - name: id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Feedback surrogate PK
    default: AUTO_INCREMENT
    pk: true
  - name: display_key
    type: VARCHAR(20)
    nullable: false
    comment: Human-readable id, e.g. FB-0001
    index: UQ_ASSET_FEEDBACK_KEY
  - name: target_kind_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: asset / element
    fk: tbl_code(code) [FBTARGET]
  - name: target_asset_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Asset this feedback is on
    fk: tbl_asset_meta(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    index: IDX_FEEDBACK_ASSET
  - name: target_element_id
    type: VARCHAR(255)
    nullable: true
    comment: BPMN element id, when target_kind_cd = ELEMENT
  - name: target_element_name
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: true
    comment: Display name of the targeted element
  - name: scope_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: operating / draft
    fk: tbl_code(code) [FBSCOPE]
  - name: version_ref_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Version this feedback references
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: author_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Feedback author
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id)
  - name: body
    type: VARCHAR(4000)
    nullable: false
    comment: Feedback text
  - name: status_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: open / resolved
    default: '''OPEN'''
    fk: tbl_code(code) [FBSTATUS]
  - name: resolved_by
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Who resolved this feedback
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id)
  - name: resolved_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: true
    comment: When it was resolved
  - name: created_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row creation time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  indexes:
  - UNIQUE uq_asset_feedback_key (display_key)
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_asset_feedback_reply
  comment: Replies to a feedback thread.
  columns:
  - name: id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Reply surrogate PK
    default: AUTO_INCREMENT
    pk: true
  - name: feedback_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Parent feedback thread
    fk: tbl_asset_feedback(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    index: IDX_FB_REPLY_FEEDBACK
  - name: author_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Reply author
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id)
  - name: body
    type: VARCHAR(4000)
    nullable: false
    comment: Reply text
  - name: created_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row creation time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  indexes: []
  notes: null
  flag: null
- name: tbl_change_proposal
  comment: Structured propose->decide flow, dedicated table per design spec Decision 2.
  columns:
  - name: id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Change proposal surrogate PK
    default: AUTO_INCREMENT
    pk: true
  - name: display_key
    type: VARCHAR(20)
    nullable: false
    comment: Human-readable id, e.g. CP-0001
    index: UQ_CHANGE_PROPOSAL_KEY
  - name: asset_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Asset this proposal targets
    fk: tbl_asset_meta(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    index: IDX_CHG_PROPOSAL_ASSET
  - name: target_version_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Version this proposal is against, if any
    fk: tbl_asset_version(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
  - name: title
    type: VARCHAR(500)
    nullable: false
    comment: Proposal title
  - name: reason
    type: VARCHAR(4000)
    nullable: false
    comment: Why this change is proposed
  - name: expected_effect
    type: VARCHAR(4000)
    nullable: false
    comment: Expected effect of the change
  - name: impact_scope
    type: VARCHAR(2000)
    nullable: false
    comment: What else this change affects
  - name: kpi_refs_json
    type: LONGTEXT
    nullable: false
    comment: JSON array of referenced KPI names
  - name: status_cd
    type: VARCHAR(10)
    nullable: false
    comment: open / accepted / rejected / applied
    default: '''OPEN'''
    fk: tbl_code(code) [CPSTATUS]
    index: IDX_CHG_PROPOSAL_STATUS
  - name: proposer_id
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: false
    comment: Who proposed the change
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id)
  - name: created_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: false
    comment: Row creation time
    default: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
  - name: decided_by
    type: BIGINT
    nullable: true
    comment: Who accepted/rejected the proposal
    fk: tbl_tenant_user(id)
  - name: decided_at
    type: TIMESTAMP
    nullable: true
    comment: When it was decided
  - name: resulting_version_id

# Runtime boundary — what process-governance authors vs. what the engine runs

> **Scope of this doc.** The invariant that separates *authoring* (this app) from
> *execution* (Camunda, via the Kotlin backend). process-governance is the agent-driven
> successor to `apps/process-assets`; it inherits the same boundary. The fuller
> backend-side treatment (deploy bridge, form delivery, license gating, the four-project
> split) lives — during the migration — in
> [`apps/process-assets/docs/architecture/runtime-boundary.md`](../../../process-assets/docs/architecture/runtime-boundary.md).
> This file is the **SSOT for the invariant as process-governance enforces it in code.**
> **구현 상태(날짜별):** [`../STATUS.md`](../STATUS.md) — 이 문서는 *timeless* 불변식 SSOT; "어디까지 됐나"는 STATUS.

## The invariant

**Every BPMN this app persists carries `isExecutable="false"`, and this app never
authors Camunda *execution* attributes.** The model is an *authoring artifact* — for
editing and governance, not for direct deployment. The Kotlin backend translates
authoring intent into a runnable Camunda model at deploy time; the runtime is **always**
`boxwood-automation-engine` (Camunda 7.24). There is no BPMN runtime inside this app.

## Where it's enforced (this app)

| Concern | Enforcer | Note |
|---|---|---|
| `isExecutable="false"` on save | [`src/shared/lib/bpmnXml.ts`](../../src/shared/lib/bpmnXml.ts) → `forceNonExecutable()` | Single source of truth. Rewrites `isExecutable="true"` → `"false"` on **every** process in the XML, regardless of what the modeler emits. |
| Same rule on the **agent** save path | [`src/shared/lib/agentDraftSave.ts`](../../src/shared/lib/agentDraftSave.ts) → `saveBpmnDraft()` | Runs the XML through `forceNonExecutable` so the propose→save flow can never drift from the editor. Covered by `agentDraftSave.test.ts`. |
| Model-quality checks (no execution concerns) | [`src/features/modeler/lib/bpmn-validation.ts`](../../src/features/modeler/lib/bpmn-validation.ts) | Pure model-level rules (start/end, connectivity, gateway shape, owner-missing, call integrity, duplicate id, call-cycle). Camunda extension properties / form-key wiring / deploy-time correctness are **explicitly out of scope**. |

Because `forceNonExecutable` is the one chokepoint shared by both write paths (editor and
agent), the rule cannot diverge between them.

## What this app does NOT author

process-governance never writes `camunda:assignee`, `camunda:candidateGroups`,
`camunda:formKey`, `camunda:topic`, `camunda:calledElement*`, `camunda:expression`,
`camunda:resultVariable`, or input/output mapping XML. Those are **execution-only**
attributes, written exclusively by the backend at deploy time (or by hand-authored XML /
external tools).

**§9.2 round-trip rule:** if such attributes already exist in imported XML, they must
survive the import → store → export cycle byte-faithfully. The app commits to *not
corrupting* them — not to *editing* them. In this app they are read-only data inside the
XML model.

## Authoring intent — what this app records instead

The app captures *intent* in `boxwood:*` extensions / asset fields; the backend translates
it to Camunda at deploy time:

| Authoring marker | Carries | Camunda translation (backend, at deploy) |
|---|---|---|
| `boxwood:taskOwner` | Designed responsible person (`Person.id`) | `camunda:assignee` or a resolving TaskListener |
| `boxwood:AutomationCandidate` | Automation strategy metadata | Read-only reporting metadata; not used by the runtime |
| `flowConditions[flowId]` (structured rule) | `always` / `formField op value` — **never FEEL** | Camunda condition expression (typically JUEL) |
| `userTaskForms[]` (HTML keyed by element id) | Form bodies | Uploaded as deployment resources + `camunda:formKey` stamped |
| `isExecutable="false"` (always) | "this is an authoring model" marker | Backend flips to `true` (or omits) at deploy |

## Condition language

FEEL is locked out. Conditions are authored as structured rules
(`{ kind: 'always' }` or `{ kind: 'formField'; field; op; value }`, where `op` is
`eq | neq | gt | gte | lt | lte | contains`) and translated to Camunda condition
expressions by the backend at deploy time.

## Anti-patterns

- **Embedding a BPMN runtime in this app.** There's already an engine — don't reinvent it.
- **Writing Camunda execution attributes from authoring code.** Intent (`boxwood:*`) only.
- **Talking to the engine directly from the frontend.** The Kotlin backend is the only
  point of contact (license gating + tenant scoping + audit happen there).
- **Bypassing `forceNonExecutable` on any new save path.** Route all BPMN writes through
  `bpmnXml.ts` so the invariant holds everywhere.

## Related

- [`apps/process-assets/docs/architecture/runtime-boundary.md`](../../../process-assets/docs/architecture/runtime-boundary.md)
  — fuller backend-side treatment (deploy bridge, form delivery, license gating). Migrates
  into this app as that scope reaches parity.
- [`docs/architecture/bff-sse.md`](./bff-sse.md) — the BFF + SSE transport SSOT.
- [`docs/README.md`](../README.md) — doc map / entry point.

# Automated guards — executable policy

> **Why this exists.** Some rules in this project are load-bearing: breaking one
> produces a *silent* defect (a wrong-coloured pixel, an agent that can't navigate,
> a vendor lock-in that breaks the Gemini→Claude swap). Prose policy rots and gets
> skipped under time pressure; a test does not. Every rule listed here is enforced by
> a check that **fails the normal test run**, so the rule holds the same way for every
> dev and every CI run — no memory, no review vigilance required.
>
> These are the strongest rung of the policy ladder: `buried doc < CLAUDE.md prose <
> skill checklist < **lint/test** < hook`. A rule that can be cheaply made executable
> belongs here, not in prose.

## The guards

| Guard | Rule (what it forbids) | Enforced by | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Route coverage** | `APP_ROUTES` must have unique ids/paths, use base-less paths, and cover **every** navigable sidebar leaf in `nav-menu.ts`. | `src/lib/routes.test.ts` | `APP_ROUTES` feeds the agent's `navigate_to` tool. Drift = the agent silently can't reach pages. |
| **PAP accent tokens** | No `var(--primary-*)` **reads** anywhere in the PAP surface (`apps/process-governance/src` + `packages/agent-ui/src`). | `src/lib/pap-tokens.test.ts` | `--primary-*` is the per-app re-brand (green in ecoletree, teal in `automation`). A shared widget that reads it silently inherits the wrong brand instead of PAP blue (`--pap-accent`). |
| **Vendor boundary** (req #2) | Vendor SDKs/endpoints (`@google/genai`, `@anthropic-ai`, `generativelanguage.googleapis…`, `GoogleGenAI`, `new Anthropic`) and **real** model ids (`gemini-3…`, `claude-sonnet…`) appear **only** in `packages/agent-core/src/llm/`. | `src/lib/vendor-boundary.test.ts` | Keeps the Gemini→Claude swap a one-line config change. Vendor coupling anywhere else defeats the `LLMProvider` seam. |

## design-guards (src/lib/design-guards.test.ts)

- **Density declaration** — every `features/*/pages/*.svelte` (+ the create route)
  must declare `data-density="compact|regular|spacious"` on its root. Spec P5.
- **Hex baseline** — no file outside `styles/app.css` may *gain* hex color
  literals; counts are frozen in `design-guards.baseline.json` and may only
  shrink. Rebaseline after debt reduction with `UPDATE_DESIGN_BASELINE=1`. Spec P1.
- **Route coverage hole:** the density guard's `pageFiles()` only walks
  `features/*/pages/*.svelte` plus the `(portal)/create` route — a future page hosted
  directly under `src/routes/**/+page.svelte` (rather than a `features/*/pages/`
  component) will **not** be scanned and must be added to `pageFiles()` by hand.
  `src/routes/drafts/+page.svelte` is a known non-portal stub outside the guard today.

## What is deliberately *allowed*

So the guards don't over-fire, each draws a precise line:

- **PAP tokens:** the pattern matches `var(--primary-` (a *read*), not bare `--primary-`. So
  rule-documenting comments are fine, and the sanctioned remap layer
  `styles/ecoletree-overrides.css` (`--primary-500: var(--pap-accent)` — a *definition*) is fine.
- **Vendor boundary:** the provider *wrapper* class name `GeminiProvider` is allowed — it's OUR
  seam (the one-line swap point the host instantiates), not a vendor SDK symbol. Placeholder
  model names in tests (`gemini-custom`, `test-model-x`) are allowed — the model-id pattern only
  matches a *real* id (a digit / `opus|sonnet|haiku` right after the dash). The separate
  `apps/automation` app has its own user-facing model picker and is **not** policed here.

## How they run

All three are plain Vitest tests under `src/lib/` and run as part of the normal suite:

```bash
pnpm --filter process-governance test            # whole suite (CI)
pnpm --filter process-governance test -- routes pap-tokens vendor-boundary   # just the guards
```

No husky, no extra tooling, no new deps — they ride the pipeline the team already runs. This
matches the repo's existing guard pattern (`routes.test.ts` predates this doc).

## Strongest rung: the pre-write hook

Two of these rules (PAP accent tokens · vendor boundary) are *also* enforced up front by a
**PreToolUse hook** — `.claude/hooks/pap-policy-guard.mjs`, wired in `.claude/settings.json`
(`Edit|Write|MultiEdit`). It scans the text about to be written and **blocks the edit**
(exit 2) before it lands, mirroring the two tests' regexes exactly, so Claude Code self-corrects
immediately instead of finding out at CI.

- Hook = fast, pre-write, **Claude Code sessions only**. Test = the **CI backstop** that also
  catches human/non-Claude edits. Keep both — defense in depth.
- The hook fails **open** (never wedges editing) and allows the same legitimate forms the tests do
  (the remap layer, the `GeminiProvider` seam, test placeholders, the two guard files, the
  `agent-core/src/llm` vendor home, `apps/automation`, docs).
- **These tests are the SSOT for the rule wording.** If you change a regex here, change it in the
  hook too (and re-run the case checks) so the two never disagree.

## Adding a new guard

When a rule keeps getting violated in review, promote it from prose to a guard:

1. Write a Vitest test in `src/lib/<name>.test.ts` that scans source text (use the fs-walk in
   `pap-tokens.test.ts` / `vendor-boundary.test.ts` as the template) and `expect(offenders).toEqual([])`
   with a message that names the fix.
2. **Match the consuming form, not the topic** — e.g. `var(--primary-` (a read), a *real* model
   id — so legitimate mentions (comments, definitions, placeholders) don't false-fire.
3. **Prove it fails on a violation before trusting it.** A guard you've never seen go red is a
   hope, not a guard. (Quick `node -e` regex check, or temporarily inject a violation.)
4. Register it in the table above and, if it encodes a CLAUDE.md rule, add an "Enforced by" note
   next to that rule so the prose and the check point at each other.

## 갱신 규칙 (keep-honest)

1. 코드가 위 상태를 바꾸면 **같은 변경에서 이 줄을 고친다.**
2. 본문 스펙(아키텍처·제품 정의)에는 status를 **흩뿌리지 않는다** — 날짜·커밋·✅는 여기로 모은다(B8).
3. 한 줄에 하나의 사실 + (있으면) 커밋 해시. 상세는 이 원장이 아니라 링크된 SSOT/원장에서.
